subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath chosen to spread the spirit of His love! The banner of the Covenant hath been raised aloft, and its standard waveth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اختاره الله لنشر روح محبه الله قد ارتفع علم المیثاق و تموج اللواء
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @humility; meekness; lowliness
